response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Partially matches; the Reference JSON only provided lyrics for the second song 'give it back', while 'All Alone With You' required manual transcription. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for the lyrics of the second song; manual transcription and translation were used for the first song and on-screen title cards. 3. Timing & Pacing: Applied aggressive truncation and instantaneous transitions for rapid vocal passages to prevent cascading delays. Included prominent visual text for song titles.

subtitles.original: 思い切り 望めないものならば
subtitles.english: ...if it is something I cannot wish for with all my heart,
I want to be with you...

subtitles.original: いつになれば楽になれる
押しては返す 波に抗がって
subtitles.english: Resisting the waves that push and return...

subtitles.original: 寝ぼけたままの顔を 埋めて
同じ夢を 願うほどに増えていくよ
subtitles.english: The more I wish for the same dream, the more it grows.

subtitles.original: 代わりなんていないよ
あなたの匂い 思い出せない波にさらって
subtitles.english: Carried away by the waves that I can't remember your scent.

subtitles.original: 夢の続きを 掴みに行くから待ってて
subtitles.english: I'll go grab the continuation of the dream, so wait for me.

subtitles.original: いつの間にか 届く頃には
subtitles.english: Without me noticing, by the time it reaches me,

subtitles.original: 湿ってく顔上げてみようか
subtitles.english: Shall I try lifting my wet face?

subtitles.original: 信じてみたい 信じてみたいの
subtitles.english: ...I want to believe, I want to believe it.

subtitles.original: 生まれたばかりの 淡い光に
subtitles.english: In the faint light just born...

subtitles.original: 希望を見たの 胸が熱いよ
subtitles.english: ...I saw hope, and my heart is warm.

subtitles.original: 手を握っていよう 迷わないように
subtitles.english: Let's hold hands, so we won't lose our way...

subtitles.original: 明日からまた 選んだ道を進めるように
subtitles.english: ...so we can continue on the chosen path from tomorrow.
